# Technical Skills

<div class="skill-bar">
<span>HTML / CSS</span>

<div class="progress">
<div class="progress-fill" style="width:95%"></div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="skill-bar">
<span>JavaScript</span>

<div class="progress">
<div class="progress-fill" style="width:90%"></div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="skill-bar">
<span>React / Angular</span>

<div class="progress">
<div class="progress-fill" style="width:85%"></div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="skill-bar">
<span>UI/UX Design</span>

<div class="progress">
<div class="progress-fill" style="width:92%"></div>
</div>

</div>


---
title: "Leadership"
---

# Leadership Experience

### Event Coordinator  
MBA Games 2025  
University Canada West

Responsibilities:

- Coordinated inter-university competitions
- Managed team scheduling
- Organized event logistics

---

# Community Involvement

I actively participate in **MBA leadership and networking events** to strengthen collaboration, communication, and strategic leadership skills.
